product_overview: Punto de Venta LYFRGL Solutions is a multi-branch POS and ERP platform for retail operations. It helps users authenticate by role, review sales and inventory by branch, manage products, and monitor audited administrative activity.
core_goals: Authenticate as an admin or manager to access operational data
Review sales across branches with branch-based access controls
View and manage the product catalog according to role permissions
Review audit logs for report access activity

features.name: Admin and Manager Authentication
features.description: Allows authorized users to sign in to the administrative area using email and password, with role-based access controlling what they can do after login.
user_flows: Navigate to /api/auth/admin-login -> Enter email credentials -> Enter password credentials -> Submit sign-in request -> Receive authenticated access
Navigate to /api/auth/admin-login -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit sign-in request -> See access denied message

features.name: Branch Selection for Authenticated Users
features.description: Lets users retrieve the available branches used to scope branch-based operations and reporting.
user_flows: Navigate to /api/auth/branches -> View the list of available branches

features.name: Sales Review
features.description: Lets authenticated users list sales records and filter them by branch, with managers subject to branch-scoped visibility rules.
user_flows: Navigate to /api/admin/sales -> View the sales list
Navigate to /api/admin/sales -> Choose a branch filter -> View the filtered sales list

features.name: Inventory Review
features.description: Lets authenticated users inspect inventory records for a selected branch.
user_flows: Navigate to /api/admin/inventory -> View the inventory records
Navigate to /api/admin/inventory -> Choose a branch filter -> View the filtered inventory records

features.name: Product Catalog Management
features.description: Lets authorized users view the product catalog, while only administrators can perform product mutations and managers can only access product listing data.
user_flows: Navigate to /api/admin/products -> View the product catalog
Navigate to /api/admin/products -> Attempt a catalog change without administrator permissions -> See the action denied

features.name: Report Access Audit Logs
features.description: Lets administrators review logs that record access to report queries and related metadata.
user_flows: Navigate to /api/admin/reports/audit-logs -> View the report access audit log list

routes.description: List sales, with branch filter and role-level overrides.
Fetch inventory records by branch, audited.
Manage products catalog (ADMIN only for mutations, GERENTE allowed GET).
Fetch report query access audit logs (ADMIN only).

features.name: Authentication and Authorization
features.description: Handles admin and cashier login and JWT validation.

features.name: Manager Role Security
features.description: Implements granular overrides to lock managers to their sucursal and block product catalog modifications.

features.name: Report Access Auditing
features.description: Hooks report endpoints to log access metadata.
